arts.ttl: Man City and Chelsea hooligans told to hand over passports for the duration of the Club World Cup as authorities look to rid the competition of troublemakers
arts.sum: Known troublemakers who support Manchester City and Chelsea will be forced to surrender their passports for the duration of the Club World Cup this summer.

arts.ttl: Man City star Ederson reveals bizarre matchday ritual he has stuck to for EIGHT years
